generated_oml:
instance InternalTempSensorOne : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High‑precision DS18S20 one‑wire digital temperature sensor located inside the insulated box for process monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTempDataTransmittedOne
]
instance InternalTempSensorTwo : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High‑precision DS18S20 one‑wire digital temperature sensor located inside the insulated box for process monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTempDataTransmittedTwo
]
instance AmbientTempSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High‑precision DS18S20 one‑wire digital temperature sensor positioned outside the insulated box to measure ambient temperature."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AmbientTempDataTransmitted
]
instance PowerSupplyMonitoringSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor system monitoring the 12–24 V power supply voltage and current feeding the incubator."
    DTDFVocab:producedData PowerVoltageDataTransmitted, PowerCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance HeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "MOSFET switch isolated by optocoupler, driven by Raspberry Pi GPIO, powering the heatbed supplied by a 12–24 V power supply."
]
instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "MOSFET switch isolated by optocoupler, driven by Raspberry Pi GPIO, controlling the circulation fan with PWM via the Raspberry Pi."
]

instance InternalTempDataTransmittedOne : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTempSensorOne
]
instance InternalTempDataTransmittedTwo : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTempSensorTwo
]
instance AmbientTempDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AmbientTempSensor
]
instance PowerVoltageDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PowerSupplyMonitoringSensor
]
instance PowerCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PowerSupplyMonitoringSensor
]

instance InternalTempDataOne : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured temperature inside the insulated box from InternalTempSensorOne."
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTempDataTransmittedOne
]
instance InternalTempDataTwo : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured temperature inside the insulated box from InternalTempSensorTwo."
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTempDataTransmittedTwo
]
instance AmbientTempData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured ambient temperature outside the insulated box."
    DTDFVocab:fromData AmbientTempDataTransmitted
]
instance PowerVoltageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured power supply voltage."
    DTDFVocab:fromData PowerVoltageDataTransmitted
]
instance PowerCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured power supply current."
    DTDFVocab:fromData PowerCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance ThermalEnergyBalanceModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "First‑order temperature model (Model A) with a single parameter energy balance."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler, ScipyOptimisationEnabler
]
instance HeatbedAirSystemModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Four‑parameter heatbed‑air system model (Model B)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler, ScipyOptimisationEnabler
]

instance PiGPIOEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller and communication hub enabling sensor reading and actuator control."
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperatureSensorService, FanControlService, HeatbedControlService
]
instance RabbitMQBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker enabling publish/subscribe communication via AMQP."
    DTDFVocab:enables MessageBrokerService
]
instance ScipyOptimisationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy optimiser enabling non‑linear least‑squares calibration of thermal models."
    DTDFVocab:enables ParameterOptimizationService
]
instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation environment enabling evaluation of thermal models using calibrated parameters."
    DTDFVocab:enables ThermalSimulationServiceA, ThermalSimulationServiceB
]
instance ControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Bang‑bang control logic providing feedback to actuators via Raspberry Pi GPIO."
    DTDFVocab:enables FanControlService, HeatbedControlService
]

instance TemperatureSensorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service orchestrating temperature sensor data collection and publishing to RabbitMQ."
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureMonitoringInsight
]
instance FanControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing PWM fan speed control via MOSFET driver."
    DTDFVocab:provides BangBangFanControlAction
]
instance HeatbedControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing heatbed activation via MOSFET driver."
    DTDFVocab:provides BangBangHeatbedControlAction
]
instance MessageBrokerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service facilitating AMQP-based message passing through RabbitMQ."
    DTDFVocab:provides MessagePublishInsight
]
instance ParameterOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service performing non‑linear least squares optimisation to calibrate model parameters."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]
instance ThermalSimulationServiceA : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service simulating Model A thermal dynamics using calibrated parameters."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelAInsight
]
instance ThermalSimulationServiceB : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service simulating Model B thermal dynamics using calibrated parameters."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelBInsight
]

instance TemperatureMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time monitoring insight of temperature sensors."
]
instance MessagePublishInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating successful message publishing to RabbitMQ."
]
instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight revealing calibrated model parameters from least‑squares optimisation."
]
instance ModelAInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating simulation output and fit quality of Model A."
]
instance ModelBInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating simulation output and fit quality of Model B."
]

instance BangBangFanControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Bang‑bang control action to switch fan on/off based on temperature threshold."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance BangBangHeatbedControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Bang‑bang control action to switch heatbed on/off based on temperature threshold."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The digital twin issues control commands (heatbed on/off, fan on/off) back to the Raspberry Pi via RabbitMQ; the controller processes these messages and drives the MOSFETs accordingly, thus affecting the PT’s operating state."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twin operates synchronously with the physical plant, sampling sensor data and applying control decisions on a sub‑second to one‑second cadence; the simulation models are updated continuously with real‑time data, enabling predictive forecasts within the 2‑second response window of the fan’s airflow cycle."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized orchestration: low‑level driver reads sensors and publishes via RabbitMQ; controller consumes commands and publishes actuator states; simulation models run as separate Python services listening to sensor streams; decision logic executes on the Pi or an external host."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design/Specification – hardware selection (styrofoam, heatbed, fan, sensors), Implementation – PCB design and Raspberry Pi driver/controller deployment, Modelling – development of two thermal models (A and B), Calibration – parameter estimation using experimental data, Validation – experimental testing of uniform temperature and model accuracy, Deployment – open‑source repository and continuous operation during incubation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity bounded by assumptions: uniform temperature distribution, negligible wall heat, constant specific heat, full energy transfer to air; validation performed by measuring maximum temperature discrepancy (≤7 °C) and calibrating four parameters; sensor accuracy ±0.5 °C over ±10–85 °C range; uncertainty in fan airflow and heatbed heat loss ignored."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Physical ↔ virtual communication is through the DS18S20 sensors on a 1‑Wire bus connected to the Pi GPIO, and MQTT messages published/subscribed via the local RabbitMQ broker over TCP/IP using the Pi’s Wi‑Fi interface. The Raspberry Pi’s Ethernet port is unused but available. Optocouplers isolate the Pi from the high‑current fan and heatbed drivers."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All twin components (controller, low‑level driver, RabbitMQ broker, simulation services) are hosted locally on the Raspberry Pi, with optional external deployment of simulation notebooks or analysis dashboards on a workstation or cloud instance."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Optocoupler isolation protects the Pi from high‑current actuation circuits; low‑level driver employs a safe protocol to ensure the PT stays within electrical safety limits; controller respects heating duration and waiting duration limits to prevent overheating; no remote execution capability described, limiting safety risk."
]
